title: Remove text from Group Summary line
excerpt: While the ‘Show Group Summary’ view option is handy for summing up the duration of the items in the group displayed on a Gantt chart, being able to just show the summary as a bar without the additional text would be hand…

posts.author: RoddP (Rodd Perrin)
posts.cookedHtml:
While the ‘Show Group Summary’ view option is handy for summing up the duration of the items in the group displayed on a Gantt chart, being able to just show the summary as a bar without the additional text would be handy i.e. not show any of the text in the red square (and maybe even not show the group name)

Gantt Group Summary Example2546×220 30.8 KB
